title: LF09 Skillset
subtitle: Provide networks and services
intro: LF09 focuses on planning, providing, and operating networks and services based on actual needs.
The core topics are requirements work, technical planning, provisioning, testing, and economically sound decisions.

subsections.title: Analyze business requirements for network provisioning
items: Capture customer requirements in a structured way
Distinguish requirement profiles by company size
Align network goals with business units and IT
Classify DevOps-like provisioning approaches
Formulate a clear target picture for networks and services

subsections.title: Implement as-is analysis and requirements specification
items: Methodically capture existing networks
Clearly identify deviations between as-is and to-be
Create requirements-specification building blocks in a structured way
Derive priorities for implementation packages
Document assumptions and boundaries

subsections.title: Evaluate technical network requirements
items: Distinguish Internet protocols by use case
Choose network components for the specific use case
Classify server software and server hardware appropriately
Consider data center requirements in principle
Compare WAN options based on need

subsections.title: Consider cost, security, and sustainability
items: Evaluate cost-benefit aspects for network decisions
Secure security requirements in the planning stage
Consider sustainability criteria for infrastructure
Price in operational risks when making decisions
Document trade-offs transparently

subsections.title: Create specifications and procurement planning
items: Derive the specifications document from requirements
Formulate functional requirements clearly
Make non-functional requirements measurable
Prepare tendering and procurement points
Define acceptance criteria early

subsections.title: Install and configure networks and services
items: Set up infrastructure components in a structured way
Configure network components for operational use
Provide server services in a classic setup
Carry out configuration steps reproducibly
Reduce rollout risks in the process

subsections.title: Perform functional tests, measurements, and documentation
items: Plan infrastructure and component tests
Capture and evaluate measurements in a targeted way
Document test findings in a traceable way
Classify deviations clearly
Prepare acceptance reports reliably

subsections.title: Present virtualization concepts in the service portfolio
items: Present the goals of a virtualization presentation in a target-audience-friendly way
Explain the virtualization concept technically and economically
Differentiate managed-service levels
Classify container and virtual application scenarios
Present portfolio arguments in a customer-oriented way

subsections.title: Secure rollout, handover, and alignment
items: Coordinate approvals, rollout windows, and fallback options
Communicate status, risks, and remaining items transparently
Secure handovers between project, operations, and support
Hand over acceptance and operations documents cleanly
Record lessons learned for follow-up projects in a structured way
